rulings.Case Title: US WESTERN FALUN DAFA ASSOCIATION et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THROUGH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Chinese Chamber Of Commerce'S Amended Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 24, 2009, line 20, Defendant Chinese Chamber of Commerce's motion for attorney fees and costs is granted in the amount of $473,245.03. Attorney billing rates and hours spent are reasonbale, resulting in Lodestar amount of $326,521. Multiplier for appellate work of 1.75 due to novel and complex issues, exceptional results, the importance of the case resulting in a published appellate opinion, and the skill and experience of Chamber's attorneys. Although anti SLAPP motion was only granted for one out of three causes of action, the sucessful and unsuccessful causes of action overlapped, the success on the motion achieved Chamber's objective and advanced its litigation posture resulting in striking the only cause of action against it. =(302/CWW/ER)
